testcase.name: runPreflight > fails when Docker is unavailable
runPreflight > skips Docker check when running inside act container
runPreflight > fails when Supabase CLI is missing
runPreflight > fails when Supabase access token is missing
runPreflight > passes when all checks succeed
runPreflight > passes when token check is skipped
seedBoard > fails fast when Supabase URL env var is missing
seedBoard > inserts the baseline grid when the board does not yet exist
seedBoard > updates the existing board grid and clears moves
resetBoard > rehydrates Supabase by delegating to seedBoard when the board is missing
resetBoard > resets the existing board grid and clears associated moves
verifySupabase instrumentation > reports healthy status with duration when probe succeeds
verifySupabase instrumentation > reports error status and message when probe fails
verifySupabase instrumentation > runs the default probe with structured Supabase query
getBoard server action > returns the board grid from Supabase
getBoard server action > throws when Supabase returns an error
getBoard server action > throws when the board row is missing
getBoard server action > validates the grid shape before returning
swapTiles server action > applies a swap, updates the board, and records the move
swapTiles server action > rejects invalid swaps without mutating the board
swapTiles server action > rejects out-of-range coordinates gracefully
swapTiles server action > throws when the board row cannot be loaded
swapTiles server action > throws when the board update fails
RoundSummaryPanel accessibility > announces new summaries via the live region
RoundSummaryPanel accessibility > moves focus to the panel whenever the summary changes
BoardGrid component > renders a 10x10 grid with accessible roles
BoardGrid component > annotates each row and cell with coordinate metadata
MoveFeedback component > renders nothing when feedback is null
MoveFeedback component > renders success feedback with polite live region
MoveFeedback component > focuses the toast when feedback changes
MoveFeedback component > calls onDismiss when the dismiss button is activated
getNextRovingIndex > wraps to the next or previous index for arrow keys
getNextRovingIndex > treats ArrowDown like ArrowRight and ArrowUp like ArrowLeft
getNextRovingIndex > jumps to the start or end for Home/End keys
getNextRovingIndex > returns the current index for unsupported keys or empty lists
useFocusTrap > focuses the first focusable element when activated
useFocusTrap > wraps focus when tabbing forward and backward
useFocusTrap > invokes the escape handler when pressing Escape
useFocusTrap > restores focus to the previously focused element when deactivated
board utilities > cloneGrid returns a deep copy of the provided board grid
board utilities > applySwap returns a new grid with swapped coordinates without mutating the input
board utilities > applySwap rejects swaps that keep the same coordinate
board utilities > assertCoordinate enforces in-bounds coordinates
board utilities > serializeGrid and deserializeGrid perform a lossless round trip
board utilities > deserializeGrid rejects malformed input
generateBoard > produces a 10x10 grid populated with letters
generateBoard > includes every alphabet character at least once
generateBoard > is deterministic for the same match id
generateBoard > differs when match id changes
generateBoard > respects weighting priority across large samples
boardScanner > should find a horizontal word left-to-right
boardScanner > should find a horizontal word right-to-left (reversed)
boardScanner > should find a vertical word top-to-down
boardScanner > should find a diagonal word down-right
boardScanner > should find a diagonal word down-left
boardScanner > should only find words with minimum 3 letters
boardScanner > should not find words that wrap around board edges
boardScanner > should return BoardWord with correct fields
boardScanner > should return empty for board with no valid words
boardScanner > should handle Icelandic characters correctly
boardScanner > should return scan duration in milliseconds
deltaDetector > should detect a new word formed by Player A's swap
deltaDetector > should ignore pre-existing words on board_before
deltaDetector > should return empty when no new words are formed
deltaDetector > should attribute words to Player B when formed by Player B's swap
deltaDetector > should handle both players forming words in same round
dictionary > loadDictionary > should load more than 2 million entries from the word list
dictionary > loadDictionary > should return a Set instance
dictionary > loadDictionary > should NFC-normalize entries so composed and decomposed forms match
dictionary > loadDictionary > should lowercase all entries
dictionary > loadDictionary > should return the same cached instance on subsequent calls
dictionary > lookupWord > should return true for known Icelandic word 'hestur'
dictionary > lookupWord > should return true for known Icelandic word 'land'
dictionary > lookupWord > should return false for invalid strings
dictionary > lookupWord > should return false for empty string
dictionary > lookupWord > should perform case-insensitive matching
dictionary > lookupWord > should treat Icelandic char ð as distinct from d
dictionary > lookupWord > should treat Icelandic char þ as distinct from t
dictionary > lookupWord > should treat Icelandic char æ as distinct from ae
dictionary > lookupWord > should NFC-normalize the input before lookup
frozenTiles > toFrozenKey > should produce 'x,y' format
frozenTiles > isFrozen > should return true for a frozen coordinate
frozenTiles > isFrozen > should return false for an unfrozen coordinate
frozenTiles > isFrozen > should return true for tiles owned by 'both'
frozenTiles > isFrozenByOpponent > should return true when tile is owned by the opponent
frozenTiles > isFrozenByOpponent > should return false when tile is owned by the same player
frozenTiles > isFrozenByOpponent > should return false when tile is owned by 'both'
frozenTiles > isFrozenByOpponent > should return false when tile is not frozen at all
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should add all tile coordinates from scored words to the map
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should set dual ownership when both players claim same tile
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should upgrade existing single ownership to 'both' when opponent claims same tile
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should enforce 24-unfrozen minimum (76 max frozen)
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should freeze in reading order (row first, then column) when partial
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should merge with existing frozen tiles without removing any
frozenTiles > freezeTiles > should skip duplicate words when freezing
scorer > calculateLetterPoints > should sum letter values correctly for 'BÚR' (B=4 + Ú=7 + R=1 = 12)
scorer > calculateLetterPoints > should sum letter values correctly for 'HESTUR'
scorer > calculateLetterPoints > should sum letter values correctly for 'LAND'
scorer > calculateLetterPoints > should handle all 32 Icelandic letters
scorer > calculateLetterPoints > should handle uppercase input by converting to uppercase for lookup
scorer > calculateLengthBonus > should return (length - 2) * 5 for all valid lengths
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 0 for 1 word
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 2 for 2 words
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 5 for 3 words
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 7 for 4 words
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 8 for 5 words (7 + (5-4))
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 9 for 6 words (7 + (6-4))
scorer > calculateComboBonus > should return 0 for 0 words
wordEngine > should return RoundScoreResult with all required fields
wordEngine > should score 'hestur' with correct letter points and length bonus
wordEngine > should return zero deltas when no new words are formed
wordEngine > should include score deltas accounting for all scored words
wordEngine > duplicate word tracking (US3) > same player forms same word in two rounds - second marked isDuplicate and 0 points
wordEngine > duplicate word tracking (US3) > different player forms same word - full points awarded (per-player tracking)
wordEngine > duplicate word tracking (US3) > combo bonus excludes duplicate words (duplicate words score 0, not counted for combo)
resultCalculator > determineMatchWinner > returns player A when their score is higher
resultCalculator > determineMatchWinner > returns player B when their score is higher
resultCalculator > determineMatchWinner > returns draw when scores match
resultCalculator > assertRematchAllowed > allows rematch when match completed and player participated
resultCalculator > assertRematchAllowed > rejects when match still in progress
resultCalculator > assertRematchAllowed > rejects when requester was not part of the match
roundEngine.advanceRound > advances to the next round when submissions from both players exist
roundEngine.advanceRound > marks conflicting submissions as rejected_invalid
roundEngine.advanceRound > returns waiting when only one submission exists
roundEngine.advanceRound > does not advance when match is not in progress
stateMachine.registerSubmission > marks submission as accepted and transitions to resolving when both submitted
stateMachine.registerSubmission > marks duplicate swap as ignored when signatures match
round advancement helpers > marks round completed
round advancement helpers > computes next round respecting round limit
round advancement helpers > signals when round should advance
TimerStore > should initialize with null timers
TimerStore > should set timers for both players
TimerStore > should pause player A timer
TimerStore > should pause player B timer
TimerStore > should resume player A timer
TimerStore > should resume player B timer
TimerStore > should not resume expired timer
TimerStore > should update timer by player ID
TimerStore > should get player timer by ID
TimerStore > should get pause status by player ID
TimerStore > should handle pause when timer is null
TimerStore > should handle resume when timer is null
roundSummary scoring utilities > calculates letter and bonus points for a word
roundSummary scoring utilities > aggregates round summary totals and highlights
server-side Supabase client factories > getServiceRoleClient caches the Supabase client instance
server-side Supabase client factories > getServiceRoleClient throws when invoked in a browser context
server-side Supabase client factories > createServiceRoleClient returns a fresh client on each call
server-side Supabase client factories > both factories fail fast when required env vars are missing
rate-limiting middleware > throws RateLimitExceededError after the configured limit is reached
rate-limiting middleware > resets counters after the window elapses
rate-limiting middleware > tracks each identifier independently
rate-limiting middleware > derives IP address from headers
rate-limiting middleware > falls back to 'unknown' when no headers match
inviteService helpers > calculates expiry timestamps using the provided TTL
inviteService helpers > detects expired invites based on creation time
inviteService helpers > prefers the oldest waiting opponent in queue arbitration
inviteService helpers > returns null when no valid opponents are found
applyLobbyEvent > replaces players on sync while deduplicating and sorting
applyLobbyEvent > adds or replaces a player on join
applyLobbyEvent > removes a player on leave events
applyLobbyEvent > keeps collection unchanged when leave target missing
GET /api/match/active > returns the active match summary when one exists
GET /api/match/active > returns null match when the user is not authenticated
GET /api/match/active > returns 500 when the lookup fails
GET /api/match/[matchId]/rounds/[round]/summary > returns identical summaries for both players (SC-004)
GET /api/match/[matchId]/rounds/[round]/summary > conforms to round summary schema (matchId, words, deltas, highlights)
POST /api/lobby/invite > returns 200 when the invite service succeeds
POST /api/lobby/invite > returns 401 when the user is not authenticated
POST /api/lobby/invite > returns 400 when the payload is missing a recipient
POST /api/auth/login > returns 200 with player payload when login succeeds
POST /api/auth/login > returns 400 when username is missing
POST /api/auth/login > returns 500 when the login helper throws
POST /api/auth/login > returns 429 when rate limit is exceeded
POST /api/match/start > returns queue result when matchmaking succeeds
POST /api/match/start > returns 401 when no lobby session is present
POST /api/match/start > returns 500 when the queue helper throws
POST /api/match/[matchId]/move > should return 200 on success
POST /api/match/[matchId]/move > should return 400 on invalid body
POST /api/match/[matchId]/move > should return 400 on action error
POST /api/match/[matchId]/move > should return 400 when move result is rejected
POST /api/match/[matchId]/move > should return 429 when the rate limiter blocks requests
POST /api/swap > returns 200 with the move result when the swap succeeds
POST /api/swap > returns 400 when the server action rejects the swap
POST /api/swap > returns 500 when the swap action throws
